name: Deploy Docusaurus site to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - parked # parking the auto-deployment for now.

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 24 # is this compatible with Docusarus v3?
          cache: npm
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install
      - name: Build website
        run: npm run build
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          publish_dir: ./build # The directory Docusaurus builds to by default
